lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਨ ਸਿਮਰਹੁ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har kee na simarahu dukh bhanjanaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Why not meditate in remembrance on the Lord, the Destroyer of pain? ||1||Pause||
then God comes and resolves his affairs. ||1||
Contemplate such spiritual wisdom, O mortal man.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਲਗੁ ਬਨੁ ਫੂਲੈ ਹੀ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: tab lag ban foolai hee naeh |
lines.english: the forest does not flower.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਸਿੰਘੁ ਰਹੈ ਬਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jab lag singh rahai ban maeh |
lines.english: As long as the tiger lives in the forest,
By Guru's Grace, one crosses over and is saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਹੀ ਸਿਆਰੁ ਸਿੰਘ ਕਉ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jab hee siaar singh kau khaae |
lines.english: But when the jackal eats the tiger,
then the entire forest flowers. ||2||
The victorious are drowned, while the defeated swim across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਰਿ ਸੈਇ ਸਲਾਰ ਹੈ ਜਾ ਕੇ ॥
lines.translit: satar saie salaar hai jaa ke |
lines.english: He has 7,000 commanders,
remain lovingly absorbed, attuned to the Lord alone. ||3||6||14||
Slave Kabeer speaks and teaches:

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਪਨ ਕੋਟਿ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਖੇਲ ਖਾਸੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: chhapan kott jaa ke khel khaasee |1|
lines.english: and 56,000,000 attendants. ||1||
He is said to have 88,000,000 shaykhs,
and hundreds of thousands of prophets;
I am meek and poor - what chance do I have of being heard there?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਜਲਸਿ ਦੂਰਿ ਮਹਲੁ ਕੋ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: majalas door mehal ko paavai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: His Court is so far away; only a rare few attain the Mansion of His Presence. ||1||Pause||
He has 33,000,000 play-houses.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਆਦਮ ਕਉ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਦਰਿ ਦਿਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa aadam kau kichh nadar dikhaaee |
lines.english: He bestowed His Grace on Adam, the father of mankind,
His beings wander insanely through 8.4 million incarnations.
who then lived in paradise for a long time. ||2||
One who blames the world, and is angry with people,
They have forsaken their Bible, and practice Satanic evil.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਲ ਖਲਹਲੁ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਜਰਦ ਰੂ ਬਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: dil khalahal jaa kai jarad roo baanee |
lines.english: Pale are the faces of those whose hearts are disturbed.
Slave Kabeer has entered Your Shelter.
You are the Great Giver, O Lord; I am forever a beggar at Your Door.
If I were to deny You, then I would be a wretched sinner.
shall receive the fruits of his own actions. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕੋਈ ਚਲਨ ਕਹਤ ਹੈ ਊਹਾਂ ॥
lines.translit: sabh koee chalan kehat hai aoohaan |
lines.english: Everyone speaks of going there,
Keep me near You, O Merciful Lord God - that is heaven for me. ||4||7||15||
speaks of heaven, but it is only talk. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਜਾਨਉ ਬੈਕੁੰਠੁ ਹੈ ਕਹਾਂ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naa jaanau baikuntth hai kahaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: but I do not even know where heaven is. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪ ਆਪ ਕਾ ਮਰਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਨਾਂ ॥
lines.translit: aap aap kaa maram na jaanaan |
lines.english: One who does not even know the mystery of his own self,
Heaven is not a fort with moats and ramparts, and walls plastered with mud;
I do not know what heaven's gate is like. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਮਨ ਬੈਕੁੰਠ ਕੀ ਆਸ ॥
lines.translit: jab lag man baikuntth kee aas |
lines.english: As long as the mortal hopes for heaven,
he will not dwell at the Lord's Feet. ||2||
Says Kabeer, now what more can I say?
The Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, is heaven itself. ||4||8||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਂਚ ਪਚੀਸ ਮੋਹ ਮਦ ਮਤਸਰ ਆਡੀ ਪਰਬਲ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: paanch pachees moh mad matasar aaddee parabal maaeaa |
lines.english: It is defended by the five elements, the twenty-five categories, attachment, pride, jealousy and the awesomely powerful Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੋਵਰ ਕੋਟ ਅਰੁ ਤੇਵਰ ਖਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dovar kott ar tevar khaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: It has double walls and triple moats. ||1||Pause||
How can the beautiful fortress be conquered, O Siblings of Destiny?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਗਰੀਬ ਕੋ ਜੋਰੁ ਨ ਪਹੁਚੈ ਕਹਾ ਕਰਉ ਰਘੁਰਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jan gareeb ko jor na pahuchai kahaa krau raghuraaeaa |1|
lines.english: The poor mortal being does not have the strength to conquer it; what should I do now, O Lord? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮੁ ਕਿਵਾਰੀ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਦਰਵਾਨੀ ਪਾਪੁ ਪੁੰਨੁ ਦਰਵਾਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaam kivaaree dukh sukh daravaanee paap pun daravaajaa |
lines.english: Sexual desire is the window, pain and pleasure are the gate-keepers, virtue and sin are the gates.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਪ੍ਰਧਾਨੁ ਮਹਾ ਬਡ ਦੁੰਦਰ ਤਹ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਵਾਸੀ ਰਾਜਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: krodh pradhaan mahaa badd dundar teh man maavaasee raajaa |2|
lines.english: Anger is the great supreme commander, full of argument and strife, and the mind is the rebel king there. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਵਾਦ ਸਨਾਹ ਟੋਪੁ ਮਮਤਾ ਕੋ ਕੁਬੁਧਿ ਕਮਾਨ ਚਢਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: svaad sanaah ttop mamataa ko kubudh kamaan chadtaaee |
lines.english: Their armor is the pleasure of tastes and flavors, their helmets are worldly attachments; they take aim with their bows of corrupt intellect.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸਨਾ ਤੀਰ ਰਹੇ ਘਟ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਇਉ ਗਢੁ ਲੀਓ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tisanaa teer rahe ghatt bheetar iau gadt leeo na jaaee |3|
lines.english: The greed that fills their hearts is the arrow; with these things, their fortress is impregnable. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਪਲੀਤਾ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਹਵਾਈ ਗੋਲਾ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਚਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: prem paleetaa surat havaaee golaa giaan chalaaeaa |
lines.english: But I have made divine love the fuse, and deep meditation the bomb; I have launched the rocket of spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਅਗਨਿ ਸਹਜੇ ਪਰਜਾਲੀ ਏਕਹਿ ਚੋਟ ਸਿਝਾਇਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: braham agan sahaje parajaalee ekeh chott sijhaaeaa |4|
lines.english: The fire of God is lit by intuition, and with one shot, the fortress is taken. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਲੈ ਲਰਨੇ ਲਾਗਾ ਤੋਰੇ ਦੁਇ ਦਰਵਾਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: sat santokh lai larane laagaa tore due daravaajaa |
lines.english: Taking truth and contentment with me, I begin the battle and storm both the gates.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਅਰੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਤੇ ਪਕਰਿਓ ਗਢ ਕੋ ਰਾਜਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: saadhasangat ar gur kee kripaa te pakario gadt ko raajaa |5|
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, and by Guru's Grace, I have captured the king of the fortress. ||5||
